subcodes.title: Words to Mr Kinney, spoken on 1909-07-02
subcodes.first_line: There are two ways of taking pictures. These things about here that you have pictured will all pass away, but the true picture is the one you take on the mirror of the heart.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @humor; jokes, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within
